narrative:
Miamisburg 4-A (precinct in Montgomery County) has 983 registered voters, with 58.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.6 percentage points.
